Instruction must be passed to another solicitor not under supervision or declined.

Instruction must be passed to another solicitor not under supervision or declined.

Purchases: Local Authority search insurance accepted only if contracts exchanged before 1st April 2021.

5.8.5: Tyneside flats/cross-over leases: Lender requires a charge over the occupied leasehold interest and the freehold reversion of the other flat.

5.14.17a: Cladding/Building Safety documents must be sent to the Marlow New Business Operations Centre.
5.14.17b: Blocks of flats with 5 or more stories are in scope for Building Safety Act 2022 remediation requirements.
Satisfactory EWS1 form (External Wall Fire Review) required if cladding exists.
EWS1 form must be less than 5 years old.
Valuer must inspect/approve EWS1; notice must be given at least 5 working days before completion.
5.14.17c: Building safety requirements (5.14.17 a & b) apply to both purchases and remortgages.
5.14.1: Minimum unexpired lease term: 70 years from mortgage completion date.
5.14.9: Regulated leases (Leasehold Reform Act 2022): Ground rent must be peppercorn only.
Non-regulated leases: Ground rent must not exceed 0.1% of market value (up to 0.2% subject to referral).
Inflation-linked (e.g. RPI) ground rent is acceptable; doubling ground rent every 5, 10, or 15 years is not acceptable.
Leases with ground rent > £250 (£1,000 in London) that risk being treated as AST under Housing Act 1988 require lease variation or indemnity insurance.
5.14.10: Contact for service charge matters: Kensington Mortgage Company Ltd, New Business Operations Centre, 2nd Floor, Marlow International, Parkway, Marlow, SL7 1YL
5.14.11: Indemnity insurance for unsatisfactory lease terms accepted if it benefits the lender, transferees, and assignees.
